metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop graphic design skills including design principles, typography, illustration, and digital design tools. This course emphasizes visual communication, composition, and application of design thinking.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on design principles, typography, illustration, and digital design tools.

big_ideas.statement: Graphic design communicates messages, ideas, and meanings through visual language.
big_ideas.elaboration: Designers use imagery, typography, color, and composition to create effective visual communication across diverse contexts and purposes.

big_ideas.statement: Design principles such as balance, contrast, and hierarchy organize visual information effectively.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding and applying design principles helps graphic artists create visually compelling and functionally clear designs.

big_ideas.statement: Typography is both functional and expressive, shaping how audiences perceive visual communication.
big_ideas.elaboration: Typeface selection, arrangement, and treatment directly influence how viewers interpret written messages and visual designs.

big_ideas.statement: Digital design tools enable creative expression and efficient production of graphic design work.
big_ideas.elaboration: Contemporary graphic designers use digital tools and software to create, revise, and produce design work across multiple platforms and media.

competencies.raw: Apply design principles to visual compositions
i_can_statements: I can apply principles such as balance, contrast, and emphasis in my designs
I can use hierarchy to organize visual information effectively
I can create visually balanced and intentional compositions
I can evaluate how design principles affect viewer perception

competencies.raw: Develop typography and type-based design skills
i_can_statements: I can select and use appropriate typefaces for different purposes
I can arrange type creatively and functionally
I can understand typography terminology and concepts
I can create designs that integrate type and imagery effectively

competencies.raw: Create illustrations and original visual imagery
i_can_statements: I can create original illustrations by hand or digitally
I can develop a personal illustration style
I can use illustration effectively in design contexts
I can integrate illustration with type and other design elements

competencies.raw: Use digital design tools and software proficiently
i_can_statements: I can operate graphic design software effectively
I can use digital tools to create and refine designs
I can understand file formats and output specifications
I can produce professional-quality digital designs

competencies.raw: Analyze graphic design and visual communication
i_can_statements: I can identify design principles in professional design work
I can analyze how design choices communicate messages
I can evaluate the effectiveness of graphic designs
I can recognize how visual hierarchy guides viewer attention

competencies.raw: Understand design thinking and problem-solving approaches
i_can_statements: I can identify design problems and user needs
I can research and analyze contexts for design work
I can generate multiple design solutions
I can make design decisions based on reasoning and analysis

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal design choices and development
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my own design work and artistic choices
I can identify my design strengths and areas for growth
I can set goals for developing as a graphic designer
I can track development of my design style and approach

competencies.raw: Connect design to cultural and commercial contexts
i_can_statements: I can understand design in cultural and social contexts
I can analyze how design reflects and shapes culture
I can understand commercial design practices and ethics
I can consider diversity and inclusivity in design
I can prepare designs for print or digital output
I can document design specifications and assets
I can organize design files and materials
I can create professional presentations of my work

competencies.raw: Present designs and communicate design concepts
i_can_statements: I can present design work to clients or audiences
I can explain design rationale and creative decisions
I can give and receive design feedback constructively
I can discuss design trends and concepts clearly

competencies.raw: Communicate through visual design and imagery
i_can_statements: I can create designs that communicate clearly and effectively
I can design for diverse audiences and contexts
I can express ideas and messages visually
I can use design to engage and connect with viewers

competencies.raw: Build a portfolio of design work
i_can_statements: I can organize and present a collection of my design work
I can document design processes and problem-solving
I can create a professional portfolio for presentation
I can showcase my design skills and capabilities

competencies.raw: Connect graphic design to other visual art forms
i_can_statements: I can understand relationships between graphic design and fine art
I can integrate photography or illustration into designs
I can explore design across multiple media
I can understand design as interdisciplinary practice

competencies.raw: Explore emerging design trends and technologies
i_can_statements: I can stay aware of current design trends and innovations
I can experiment with new design tools and approaches
I can adapt to evolving design practices and platforms
I can develop designs relevant to contemporary contexts

competencies.raw: Engage with design in diverse cultural contexts
i_can_statements: I can study design from diverse cultures and regions
I can appreciate different design aesthetics and traditions
I can incorporate diverse perspectives into my design work
I can recognize the global nature of design practice

competencies.raw: Explore graphic design careers and professional pathways
i_can_statements: I can understand careers in graphic design and related fields
I can develop a professional portfolio for job applications
I can network with design professionals
I can build pathways toward design industry work
